description: Start streaming VIDEO frames with a specified codec and update interval. The server responds with periodic VIDEO messages until a STP_VIDEO is received.

fields.name: codec
fields.description: Requested FourCC codec: 'I420' (uncompressed YUV), 'H264', 'VP90' (VP9), 'X265', 'O265' (OpenHEVC), 'AV10' (AV1). All four bytes significant. The server SHOULD honor the request or reject with an error status.

fields.name: time_interval
fields.description: Minimum time between consecutive VIDEO frames, in milliseconds. 0 means 'as fast as possible'.

legacy_notes: Upstream defines IGTL_STT_VIDEO_SIZE as 9, but the igtl_stt_video struct under #pragma pack(1) is 8 bytes (char[4] + uint32). The CRC function uses IGTL_STT_VIDEO_SIZE=9, computing CRC over one byte past the struct — likely a latent bug. A conformant implementation SHOULD use body_size=8.
